name: conviso-mcp
description: Expose Conviso Platform data (companies, projects, issues, assets, metrics) to MCP clients.
long_description: This MCP server provides tools to query companies, projects, issues, assets and risk metrics from the Conviso Platform.

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Get company plan, integrations and branding details.

tools.name: get_issues
tools.description: List vulnerabilities by company or project (supports page, limit, project_id).

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get technical details for an issue, optionally including code/request/response snippets.

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: List active security projects (supports page, limit, search).

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get specific project details by ID.

tools.name: get_assets
tools.description: List assets for a company (supports page, limit).

tools.name: create_issue_url
tools.description: Generate a direct URL to an issue in the Conviso Platform.

tools.name: create_project_url
tools.description: Generate a direct URL to a project in the Conviso Platform.

tools.name: get_mttr_over_time
tools.description: Get MTTR metrics over time (supports severities, statuses, asset filters).

tools.name: get_overall_risk_score_history
tools.description: Get overall risk score history for a company.
